task_description: Enhance the CDK sleep audio pipeline with advanced error handling (specific Catch blocks for Lambda/Polly/DynamoDB errors), retry policies (exponential backoff on key tasks), and improved observability (X-Ray on Lambda, structured logging, CloudWatch Alarms, CloudWatch Dashboard). Follows strict TDD approach.

verification.summary: All 70 tests pass (8 new + 62 existing). CDK synth succeeds. Tests verify specific error catches, retry policies, X-Ray tracing, CloudWatch Alarms, and Dashboard. New tests would fail if implementations were reverted.
